name: atlas_action
description: Perform an action on the Atlas research table canvas when the user is on atlas.html. Use to add sticky notes, open vault library items as embed windows, or recall (pin) a library collection in the sidebar. File imports from chat attachments happen automatically on send — do not call import_chat_attachment unless confirming a prior import.

action.description: add_note = new sticky note on canvas; open_item = open library item by id; recall_collection = pin collection in sidebar; import_chat_attachment = no-op (files auto-import on chat send)

title.description: For add_note: note window title (plain text or short HTML)

id.description: For open_item: library item id (e.g. nfs-roadmap, nfs-dash, gs-main)

name.description: For recall_collection: folder/collection name exactly as in library (e.g. Najd Fault System)
